## application-data/dungine/cache/

The `application-data/dungine/asset/` folder contains

| Folder name         | Folder description                                     |
|--------------------:|:-------------------------------------------------------|
|`audio/`             | Dungine audio files                                    |
|`font/`              | Dungine font files                                     |
|`image/`             | Dungine image files                                    |
|`video/`             | Dungine video files                                    |

Each `application-data/dungine/asset/*` folder may contain subfolders for specific assets.
